content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！
《忘却前夜》OST：骸骨长眠之所，今日发布～欢迎大家收听、下载及分享～如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！（二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用）

忘却前夜OST：骸骨长眠之所
你见过最可怖而亵渎的啖食，却是他们生命中最温柔的重逢。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
规划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST: "Sanctuary of Final Repose" was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

Morimens OST: "Sanctuary of Final Repose" 
The most horrifying and profane feast you've ever witnessed was, for them, the most tender of reunions.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：骸骨长眠之所

content:
**01.食尸鬼之歌-Song of the Ghouls-**

欢庆吧，我的朋友♪
月光下的骸骨悄然绽放，一位挚爱被送上餐盘♪
所有的宾客都已到来！唱呀，跳呀♪
我们从不为亡灵祈祷，我们从不为尸首哀悼♪
她将记忆交予了我，她将眼泪交予了我♪
让我们咽下她的魂灵与腐肉♪
在死亡的盛宴中，我们再度重圆♪

Celebrate, my friend♪
The bones beneath the moon hum a rotting tune♪
A beloved lies still on the silver plate♪
All guests have arrived♪Sing! Dance! Now we consecrate!♪
Never mourn the corpses♪Never pray for the dead♪
Her memories in my hands♪her tears in my teeth♪
Let us swallow her soul, her flesh so sweet ♪
In our deathly banquet, where loved ones meet♪
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：骸骨长眠之所

content:
**02.餐桌的主人-Lord of Necrovia-**

烹饪死者，是一项庄严的艺术。
他用刀与铲探问未竟的遗言，他用水与火满足最后的遗愿。
每一块难堪的、痛苦的、酸涩的记忆，都将化作闪耀而芬芳的作品，供人品味珍藏。

To cook the deceased is a solemn art.
With dining knife and spatula, he inquires about unfinished last words; with water and fire, he fulfills final wishes.
Every memory—awkward, painful, bitter—will transform into a brilliant and fragrant dish, for people to taste and cherish.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：骸骨长眠之所

content:
**03.安息舞曲-Requiem's Rhythm-**

时间已至，银月高悬。
快把僵硬的脚尖点起，今夜要欢度这宴会时光。
她已走到最后的旅程，而我们用胃袋为她送葬。
一口给你，一口给我，从今往后谁都不会遗忘。

The time has come, the silver moon hangs high.
Quickly, let your cold toes rise and dance; tonight we celebrate this banquet.
She has reached the end of her journey, and we offer her a funeral with our stomachs.
A bite for you, a bite for me; from now on, she lives forever in our memories.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：骸骨长眠之所

content:
**04.探戈外交-Tango de Salon-**

你从没想到，与一位王者的对谈是由一场共舞开始。
强势的入侵，游离的试探，进攻与防守，对峙与退让，你们在旋转的衣摆中隐秘交锋。
一场交易优雅结束在最后的谢幕，王的发丝翩翩垂落，你看到那双雾气萦绕的眼中闪烁着愉悦的笑意。
咦？刚刚是不是被他牵着鼻子走了？

You never imagined your conversation with the ghoul king would begin with a dance.
A forceful advance, a lingering probe, offense and defense, confrontation and yielding... You engaged in a secret duel within the swirls of your garments.
The transaction ended elegantly with the final bow. His long lavender-colored hair fell softly, and you saw a gleeful smile sparkling in his misty eyes.
Wait, were you just played?
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：骸骨长眠之所

content:
**05.死神的垂眸-Pietatis Mortis-
**
他收殓每一份死亡时，并不是无情地挥舞着镰刀。 
他也曾有温热的双手，也曾有善感的心灵。
当他品味到那灵魂的悲伤，他会随之一同落泪。
当他饱尝到那刻骨的仇恨，他会代之降下审判。
他以葬骸之主的名义许诺：一切亵渎死亡之人，都将消散于冰寒的浓雾。

When he collects each death, he doesn't swing his scythe heartlessly.
His hands were once warm, his heart gentle and full of compassion.
When he drinks in the sorrow of a soul, he weeps with it.
When he weighs deep-seated hatred, he delivers judgment in its stead.
He made a solemn vow in the name of the Lord of Necrovia: all who profane death will vanish into the icy, dense mist.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：骸骨长眠之所

content:
**06.万灵之怒-Wrath of the Spirits-**

「以你们的朋友、王、这片安眠之地主人的名义，我邀请你们——苏醒吧！回到你们眷恋的故土！将这些打扰我们亲人安宁之人，永远驱逐出去！」

"As your friend, your king, and the master of this eternal resting place, I implore you—awake! Return to the homeland you cherish! Banish these trespassers who disturb the peace of our kin, forever!"
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：骸骨长眠之所

content:
**07.血色契约-Bloodied Promise-**

血肉腥甜的滋味与肌腱断裂的口感是他最熟悉、也最刻骨铭心的记忆。
他早已明白，这座葬骸城得以延续至今日，并不源于生者的力量，而是源自于亡者的牺牲。
又一抹殷红吞咽于喉舌，他闭上双眼，仔细品尝着每一丝不同的香气，将每个灵魂的味道牢牢记下，于是他的亲朋与子民都在他的身躯中永生。
他们约定永远相聚。

The sweet taste of flesh, the texture of tearing tendons—these are his most familiar and unforgettable memories.
He has long understood that the City of Necrovia endures because of its dead's sacrifice, not its living's power.
Another splash of crimson goes down his throat. He closes his eyes, carefully savoring each unique fragrance, imprinting the taste of every soul into his memory. In this way, his loved ones and his people achieve eternal life within his body.
They are promised to be together, forever.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：骸骨长眠之所

content:
**08.满月祭礼-Full Moon Sacrifice-**

亵渎者掀起幽蓝的海啸，单薄的王者孤身迎向千米巨浪。
他的发丝于风中飞扬，他的骨与血即是他庄严的宣告，于轻蔑的笑容中，他将自己亦献于死亡与月亮。
于是整片海在此刻凝结，倒悬的冰川静止于满月之下，一切归于寂静，一切安宁重回他的国度。

The desecrators unleashe a cataclysmic wave, but the solitary king meets the roaring tide alone.
His hair flutters in the wind, his bones and blood his solemn proclamation. With a contemptuous smile, he offers himself to death and the moon.
The sea freezes in that instant, an inverted glacier suspended beneath the full moon. Everything falls silent, and peace returns to his kingdom.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：骸骨长眠之所

content:
**09.勿忘我的送别-Forget-Me-Not from Him-**

别离与死亡，都是世间无法逃离的常态。
从无数牺牲与死亡中脱离，走向渺茫的前路，淡淡的悲伤萦绕在你的心头。然而在目睹了生活于死亡之中的人们，目睹了将死亡赋予温柔结局的王者后，你已不再畏惧未知的结局。
一朵紫色的勿忘我飘落在你的肩头，替他遥遥相送。
你知道，无论如何，你的归途并不孤独。

Separation and death are this world's inescapable realities.
 Though you've escaped countless sacrifices to walk an uncertain path, a faint sorrow lingers in your heart. But, having witnessed a people who live among their dead, and their king who weaves death into a gentle, everlasting embrace, you no longer fear the unknown.
A purple forget-me-not, a farewell gift from Doresain, drifts onto your shoulder. 
You know now that no matter what, your journey home will not be a lonely one.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：骸骨长眠之所
